THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, HILDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 226 SIXTH STREET #28, SAN FRANCISCO $729.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $729.00, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL. $9.00 PER DAY PER DIEM HOLDOVER.
